Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Well, I think that you've taken enough of my time.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: You did visit me at an opportune time, but that's rare for someone with my kind of work schedule. I'd suggest to at least make an appointment next time. Definitely don't just barge in.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: That somehow sounds more like a threat than an actual suggestion.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: But what's the point? Security and law enforcement on Kweebdrasil practically don't exist.

Line.Text: Actually-- meh, don't bother. It's not like that's going to improve anytime soon.
